title: tell me about the most interesting research neuralink is working on currently
summary: Completed deep synthesis of Neuralink's current research portfolio (Telepathy/PRIME clinical trials, Blindsight visual prosthesis, CONVOY robotic control, VOICE speech decoding, and core N1/R1 platform engineering) using five general-mode literature searches. Deliverable was answer-only; no report, diagram, slides, or PDF artifacts were created.
assumptions: 'Currently' is interpreted as publicly reported work through late 2025 and early 2026.
Focus is on Neuralink's disclosed clinical programs and engineering directions rather than long-term consumer 'mind meld' speculation.

Information is drawn from company updates, regulatory designations, and credible tech/health journalism; Neuralink publishes limited peer-reviewed data, so clinical claims are treated as early-stage unless independently validated.
The most 'interesting' research is ranked by scientific ambition and near-term clinical impact, not commercial hype.
